channel.title: Photography on Anirudh Vemula
channel.description: Recent content in Photography on Anirudh Vemula

item.title: New York City
item.description: Some of these photos were taken in New York city when I visited it in October for an AI forum. I wanted to take pictures in NYC for so long and felt this was as good a time as any. So, carried my old-ass camera around uptown and midtown manhattan, and took most of the photos.

item.title: Graffiti in Pittsburgh through 35mm
item.description: Early fall 2017, I went on a search for graffiti in Pittsburgh and found a lot! Took a bunch of snaps and developed them on Ilford HP5 35mm. To get most of these I had to bike around Pittsburgh (mostly in Lawrenceville and Oakland). Never knew Pittsburgh had so much street art (some might call it vandalism though).
